lines.speaker: Froono
lines.text: I'm just looking at the magic trees. I think they're cool.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, they are magical. Valuable as well...

lines.speaker: Froono
lines.text: When I grow up I want to chop down trees and make magic bows. Then I'd be rich.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, that does seem to be a common career around here.

lines.speaker: Froono
lines.text: Hee Hee Hee. It worked! Thanks mister.
